message:
refactor(interactive): extract agent dispatch, extension session, share/compact/fork handlers, and tests into dedicated submodules

The monolithic interactive.rs (4000+ lines) was becoming unwieldy for
concurrent development by multiple agents. This refactor breaks it into
focused submodules without changing any behavior:

New submodules:
- agent.rs (1341 lines): Extracts extension_commands_for_catalog(),
  build_user_message(), dispatch_input_event(), and all agent dispatch
  logic that was previously inline in interactive.rs
- ext_session.rs (492 lines): Extracts InteractiveExtensionHostActions
  and InteractiveExtensionSession — the extension host trait impls that
  bridge extensions with the interactive session state
- tests.rs (1569 lines): Extracts all #[cfg(test)] blocks from
  interactive.rs into a dedicated test module (render_tool_message_tests,
  format_count tests, tool_progress tests, etc.)

Moved handlers into existing submodules:
- share.rs: handle_slash_share() PiApp impl block moved from interactive.rs,
  with clipboard import and Arc dependency added
- perf.rs: handle_slash_compact() PiApp impl block moved from interactive.rs,
  with compaction logic, token reserve config, and extension event dispatch
- tree.rs: handle_slash_fork() and ForkCandidate struct moved from
  commands.rs, with conversation_from_session integration for fork preview
- conversation.rs: conversation_from_session() added — reconstructs
  ConversationMessage vec + Usage from Session entries, handling User,
  Assistant, ToolResult, and BashExecution message types

Visibility change:
- view.rs: view() promoted from fn to pub(super) fn so extracted
  submodules can call it

interactive.rs net reduction: ~3600 lines removed, replaced by mod
declarations and use imports for the new submodules.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
